title: androsace pedunculata
intro: Androsace pedunculata, also known as the Rock Jasmine or Alpine Rose, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Androsace pedunculata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Androsace pedunculata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
